zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Joan de Gatton於大約1290年出生時，她的父親Hamo de Gatton IV28歲，母親Lady Marjory of Kent25歲。她於大約1307年與Sir Simon de Northwode在英國英格蘭素瑞結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1334年享年45歲，埋葬在英國肯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Joan de Gatton于大约1290年出生时，她的父亲Hamo de Gatton IV28岁，母亲Lady Marjory of Kent25岁。她于大约1307年与Sir Simon de Northwode在英国英格兰素瑞结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1334年享年45岁，埋葬在英国肯特。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Gatton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Sussex and Surrey): habitational name for someone from a place in Surrey so named, from Old English gāt ‘goat’ + tūn ‘enclosure’.

variants.name: Gatten
meanings: English: variant of   Gatton  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Joan de Gatton was born about 1290, her father, Hamo de Gatton IV, was 28 and her mother, Lady Marjory of Kent, was 25. She married Sir Simon de Northwode about 1307, in Surrey, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died in 1334, at the age of 45, and was buried in Kent, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Joan de Gatton est née environ 1290, son père, Hamo de Gatton IV, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Lady Marjory of Kent, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Simon de Northwode environ 1307, à Surrey, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée en 1334, à l’âge de 45 ans, et a été enterrée à Kent, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Joan de Gatton um 1290 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hamo de Gatton IV 28 und ihre Mutter Lady Marjory of Kent 25. Sie hat um 1307 in Surrey, England, United Kingdom Sir Simon de Northwode geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb 1334 im Alter von 45 Jahren und wurde in Kent, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Joan de Gatton è nata il circa 1290, sua padre, Hamo de Gatton IV, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Lady Marjory of Kent, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Sir Simon de Northwode circa 1307, nel Surrey, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1334, all'età di 45 anni, e fu sepolta a Kent, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Joan de Gattonが約1290年に生まれた時，父Hamo de Gatton IVは28歳，母Lady Marjory of Kentは25歳であった。約1307年にイギリスイギリススリーでSir Simon de Northwodeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1334年に45歳で死去し，イギリスケントにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Joan de Gatton(이)가 대략 1290년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hamo de Gatton IV(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Marjory of Kent(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 대략 1307년 영국 잉글랜드 수리에서 Sir Simon de Northwode(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1334년 45세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 켄트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Joan de Gatton nasceu aproximadamente 1290, seu pai, Hamo de Gatton IV, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Lady Marjory of Kent, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Simon de Northwode aproximadamente 1307, em Surrey, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1334, com 45 anos, e foi sepultada em Kent, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Joan de Gatton родилась около 1290 г., её отцу по имени Hamo de Gatton IV было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Marjory of Kent, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Simon de Northwode около 1307 г. в местности сурри, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла в 1334 г. в возрасте 45 лет и была похоронена в местности кэнт, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Joan de Gatton nació aproximadamente 1290, su papá, Hamo de Gatton IV, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Lady Marjory of Kent, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Sir Simon de Northwode aproximadamente 1307, en Surrey, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1334, a la edad de 45 años, y fue sepultada en Kent, Inglaterra.
